Added_Camera/UI.name: DFFlagFixSpawnCameraLookingDown
Added_Camera/UI.mechanism: Adjusts the camera position at spawn to prevent it from looking down.
Added_Camera/UI.purpose: Ensures players start the game with a better view of their surroundings.

Added_Camera/UI.name: FFlagAddOriginalGuidAttributeOnScriptClone2
Added_Camera/UI.mechanism: Adds a unique identifier to cloned scripts for tracking.
Added_Camera/UI.purpose: Helps developers manage and identify scripts more easily.

Added_Other.name: FFlagAcousticSimulationPathfindingManhattanHeuristic
Added_Other.mechanism: Uses a Manhattan distance approach for pathfinding in acoustic simulations.
Added_Other.purpose: Allows for more efficient navigation and sound propagation, making gameplay smoother.

Added_Other.name: FFlagBootcampCLI180439
Added_Other.mechanism: Implements a command-line interface for bootcamp features.
Added_Other.purpose: Streamlines the onboarding process for new developers, making it easier to get started with Roblox.

Added_Other.name: FFlagOCNewTelem
Added_Other.mechanism: Introduces new telemetry features for object creation.
Added_Other.purpose: Provides developers with better insights on how objects are created, improving game performance.

Added_Other.name: FFlagPreventRenamingFiberRunners
Added_Other.mechanism: Restricts the renaming of certain internal components to maintain stability.
Added_Other.purpose: Helps ensure that the game runs smoothly without unexpected issues from component changes.

Added_Other.name: FFlagProcessDarwinWorkerSetQosClass
Added_Other.mechanism: Adjusts quality of service settings for worker processes.
Added_Other.purpose: Optimizes performance and responsiveness of game features.

Added_Other.name: FFlagPTFDeviceInfo
Added_Other.mechanism: Enables access to detailed device information for players.
Added_Other.purpose: Allows games to tailor experiences based on the player's device capabilities.

Added_Other.name: FFlagPTFDeviceInfoParameters
Added_Other.mechanism: Enhances device information gathering for better performance tracking.
Added_Other.purpose: Allows players to have a smoother experience by optimizing game performance based on their device.

Added_Other.name: FIntAcousticSimulationDensityCacheMaxRetries_Staged
Added_Other.mechanism: Sets the maximum number of retries for acoustic simulation density caching.
Added_Other.purpose: Improves sound accuracy in complex environments, enhancing the player's auditory experience.

Added_Other.name: FIntAcousticSimulationPathCacheMaxRetries_Staged
Added_Other.mechanism: Sets a limit on the number of retries for acoustic simulation pathfinding.
Added_Other.purpose: Improves performance in sound simulation, leading to a more realistic audio experience for players.
